statements.__comment__: DEPRECATED: temporary backward-compatibility migration. Earlier versions did not model CrowdstrikeTenant; CrowdstrikeHost nodes carried the CID as a property but had no parent. Backfill a CrowdstrikeTenant node for every distinct CID seen on existing hosts. Idempotent (MERGE). Remove in v1.0.0.
statements.query: MATCH (h:CrowdstrikeHost) WHERE h.cid IS NOT NULL WITH DISTINCT h.cid AS cid MERGE (t:CrowdstrikeTenant {id: cid}) ON CREATE SET t.firstseen = timestamp(), t.lastupdated = timestamp()

statements.__comment__: DEPRECATED: same backfill from existing SpotlightVulnerability nodes (vulns may exist with no host of the same CID synced).
statements.query: MATCH (v:SpotlightVulnerability) WHERE v.cid IS NOT NULL WITH DISTINCT v.cid AS cid MERGE (t:CrowdstrikeTenant {id: cid}) ON CREATE SET t.firstseen = timestamp(), t.lastupdated = timestamp()

statements.__comment__: DEPRECATED: backfill the RESOURCE edge from CrowdstrikeTenant to existing hosts so the new scoped cleanup can see them. Remove in v1.0.0.
statements.query: MATCH (h:CrowdstrikeHost), (t:CrowdstrikeTenant {id: h.cid}) MERGE (t)-[r:RESOURCE]->(h) ON CREATE SET r.lastupdated = h.lastupdated

statements.__comment__: DEPRECATED: same RESOURCE edge backfill for SpotlightVulnerability. Remove in v1.0.0.
statements.query: MATCH (v:SpotlightVulnerability), (t:CrowdstrikeTenant {id: v.cid}) MERGE (t)-[r:RESOURCE]->(v) ON CREATE SET r.lastupdated = v.lastupdated
